glosses.fr: chambre double; chambre pour deux personnes
glosses.it: camera doppia; camera per due persone
glosses.pt: quarto duplo; quarto para duas pessoas
glosses.tr: çift kişilik oda; iki kişilik oda
glosses.vi: phòng đôi; phòng cho hai người

translations.hi: मैं दो लोगों के लिए कमरा आरक्षित कर रहा हूँ.
translations.id: Saya memesan kamar untuk dua orang.
translations.ja: ダブルルームを予約します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative; 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present tense, 1st person singular; transitive, selecting an accusative object.
Indefinite article; agrees with neuter singular noun; here determiner of the direct object in accusative.
Compound noun (neuter); singular; direct object of 'buche' in accusative.

sentences.target: Wir nehmen das Doppelzimmer mit Frühstück.

translations.de: Wir nehmen das Doppelzimmer mit Frühstück.
translations.en: We’ll take the double room with breakfast.
translations.es: Tomamos la habitación doble con desayuno.
translations.fr: Nous prenons la chambre double avec petit-déjeuner.
translations.it: Prendiamo la camera doppia con colazione.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们要含早餐的双人房。
translations.yue: 我哋要包早餐嘅雙人房。
translations.ru: Мы берём двухместный номер с завтраком.
translations.pt: Ficamos com o quarto duplo com café da manhã.
translations.he: אנחנו ניקח חדר זוגי עם ארוחת בוקר.
translations.tr: Kahvaltı dahil çift kişilik odayı alıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi lấy phòng đôi kèm bữa sáng.
translations.nl: We nemen de tweepersoonskamer met ontbijt.
translations.uk: Ми беремо двомісний номер зі сніданком.
translations.hi: हम नाश्ते के साथ दो लोगों का कमरा लेंगे.
translations.el: Θα πάρουμε δίκλινο δωμάτιο με πρωινό.
translations.id: Kami akan mengambil kamar untuk dua orang dengan sarapan.
translations.ro: Luăm camera dublă cu mic dejun.
translations.fi: Otamme kahden hengen huoneen, jossa on aamiainen.
translations.ja: 朝食付きのダブルルームにします。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative; 1st person plural; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present tense, 1st person plural; transitive, taking an accusative object.
Definite article; neuter singular; determiner of 'Doppelzimmer' as direct object in accusative.
Noun (neuter); singular; direct object of 'nehmen' in accusative.
Preposition; governs dative; introduces a prepositional phrase indicating accompaniment.
Noun (neuter); here as a bare noun complement of 'mit' in dative; specifies the included service.

sentences.target: Das Doppelzimmer kostet heute achtzig Euro.

translations.de: Das Doppelzimmer kostet heute achtzig Euro.
translations.en: The double room costs eighty euros today.
translations.es: La habitación doble cuesta hoy ochenta euros.
translations.fr: La chambre double coûte aujourd’hui quatre-vingts euros.
translations.it: La camera doppia costa oggi ottanta euro.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天双人房要八十欧元。
translations.yue: 雙人房今日要八十歐元。
translations.ru: Двухместный номер сегодня стоит восемьдесят евро.
translations.pt: O quarto duplo custa hoje oitenta euros.
translations.he: החדר הזוגי עולה היום שמונים יורו.
translations.tr: Bugün çift kişilik oda seksen avro tutuyor.
translations.vi: Hôm nay phòng đôi có giá tám mươi euro.
translations.ar: الغرفة المزدوجة تكلف اليوم ثمانين يورو.
translations.nl: De tweepersoonskamer kost vandaag tachtig euro.
translations.uk: Сьогодні двомісний номер коштує вісімдесят євро.
translations.hu: A kétágyas szoba ma nyolcvan euróba kerül.
translations.hi: आज दो लोगों का कमरा अस्सी यूरो का है.
translations.pl: Dzisiaj pokój dwuosobowy kosztuje osiemdziesiąt euro.
translations.el: Το δίκλινο δωμάτιο σήμερα κοστίζει ογδόντα ευρώ.
translations.nb: Dobbeltrommet koster i dag åtti euro.
translations.id: Hari ini kamar untuk dua orang harganya delapan puluh euro.
translations.sv: Dubbelrummet kostar i dag åttio euro.
translations.ro: Astăzi camera dublă costă optzeci de euro.
translations.cs: Dnes stojí dvoulůžkový pokoj osmdesát eur.
translations.da: Dobbeltværelset koster i dag firs euro.
translations.fi: Kahden hengen huone maksaa tänään kahdeksankymmentä euroa.
translations.ja: 今日のダブルルームは80ユーロです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; neuter singular; determiner of the subject noun in nominative.
Noun (neuter); singular; subject of the clause in nominative.
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person singular; predicate stating price.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; indicates the time (today).
Cardinal numeral; quantifies 'Euro' in a measure phrase.
Currency noun; head of the measure phrase functioning as the price complement (accusative in usage).

translations.en: My brother is sleeping in the double room.
translations.es: Mi hermano está durmiendo en la habitación doble.
translations.fr: Mon frère dort dans la chambre double.
translations.it: Mio fratello sta dormendo nella camera doppia.
translations.zh-Hans: 我哥哥在双人房里睡觉。
translations.yue: 我哥哥喺雙人房瞓緊覺。
translations.ru: Мой брат спит в двухместном номере.
translations.pt: Meu irmão está dormindo no quarto duplo.
translations.tr: Erkek kardeşim çift kişilik odada uyuyor.
translations.vi: Anh trai tôi đang ngủ trong phòng đôi.
translations.nl: Mijn broer slaapt in de tweepersoonskamer.
translations.uk: Мій брат спить у двомісному номері.
translations.hu: A bátyám a kétágyas szobában alszik.
translations.hi: मेरा भाई दो लोगों के कमरे में सो रहा है.
translations.pl: Mój brat śpi w pokoju dwuosobowym.
translations.el: Ο αδελφός μου κοιμάται στο δίκλινο δωμάτιο.
translations.id: Saudara laki-laki saya sedang tidur di kamar untuk dua orang.
translations.ro: Fratele meu doarme în camera dublă.
translations.cs: Můj bratr spí ve dvoulůžkovém pokoji.
translations.ja: 私の兄はダブルルームで寝ています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; modifies 'Bruder'; agrees with masculine singular noun in nominative.
Noun (masculine); singular; subject of the intransitive verb.
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person singular; intransitive.
Preposition; part of the contraction 'im' (= in + dem); governs dative; introduces a locative PP.
Definite article; dative singular neuter; complements 'in'; determiner of 'Doppelzimmer'.
Noun (neuter); singular; object of the preposition 'in' in dative; denotes location.
